Title: Multiplayer TicTacToe with Nakama Backend
Description: A real-time, multiplayer Tic-Tac-Toe game built with React + TypeScript on the frontend and Nakama (open-source game server) on the backend. Supports Classic and Timed game modes, a global leaderboard, persistent player stats, and concurrent match sessions with authoritative server-side game logic.
KeyFeatures: Global leaderboard with persistent player stats
Unique Player ID system with display names
Nakama admin console for real-time monitoring

Title: Volumetric 3D Lung Nodule Detection
Description: Deep learning system for early lung cancer detection from CT scans using 3D volumetric data. Implements state-of-the-art architectures with 96.7% recall rate, featuring preprocessing, augmentation, and comprehensive evaluation metrics.

Title: Cervical Spine Fracture Detection
Description: Advanced fracture detection system using Deformable DETR Transformers for improved accuracy in CT scan analysis. Implements deformable attention mechanisms for better localization and classification of cervical spine fractures.

Title: Rule Engine
Description: Dynamic rule evaluation system using Abstract Syntax Tree (AST) for complex conditional logic. Features REST APIs for rule creation, evaluation, and combination with MongoDB persistence and optimized rule merging.

Title: Weather Master
Description: Full-stack weather monitoring application providing real-time and historical weather data for Indian cities. Features interactive charts, automatic data updates via cron jobs, and threshold-based weather alerts.

Title: Responsive Portfolio Website
Description: Modern portfolio website built with React.js and Tailwind CSS featuring responsive design, reusable components, and clean UI. Showcases skills and projects effectively with mobile-first approach and smooth animations.
